examples: You've grown a belly over Christmas! Time to join the gym again.

definitions.text: stomach (an organ in animals that stores food in the process of digestion)
examples: My belly was full of wine.

definitions.text: uterus (a reproductive organ of therian mammals in which the young are conceived and develop until birth)
To position one’s belly; to move on one’s belly.
To swell and become protuberant; to bulge or billow.
To cause to swell out; to fill.
